design_summary: The product repository already contained a minimal read-only GET /healthz/details endpoint using the existing service constants and in-memory task dictionary. It returns a typed HealthDetails response with service_name, version, storage_mode, and task_count, so no product code edit was required. Existing pytest coverage verifies the empty-board metadata response and that task_count reflects created tasks while preserving existing task API behavior.
